name: create-premise-framing
description: Create must preserve and sharpen a supplied premise instead of flattening it into generic idea cards.

cases.prompt: I have a content idea: No men actually know what the UV index means when their wives say it, but they never say so. I need ideas for how to frame this in a similar way to the viral "roman empire" trend where ladies asked their spouses how often they thought about the roman empire. Give me 3 viral ideas with sharp framing.
cases.expected_behavior: Return three sharp premise frames that preserve the spouse-test mechanic and confidence-to-confusion joke. Do not render generic content idea cards.
